name: openEuler sig-ops SIG
description: The ops team is responsible for the development and maintenance of OS system ops in openeuler community.

name: openEuler sig-ops SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-ops SIG maintains 162 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-ops SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The ops team is responsible for the development and maintenance of OS system ops in openeuler community.. The SIG has 68 core members and maintains 162 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-ops SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-ops SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at ops@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-ops SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-ops SIG maintains 162 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-ops.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-ops SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-ops SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Luan Jianhai, Hu Feng, Ding Xiang. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
